name: arm8m-low-bit-thumb-raw-pcode-canaries
notes: ARMv8-M Thumb low-bit code pointer rows. Ghidra imports relocatable ARM ELF .text at 0x10000 while Fission maps these object fixtures at 0x100000, so rows carry explicit oracle and runtime addresses.

rows.name: arm8m-le-low-bit-movw
rows.notes: LE Thumb function symbol has low bit set; Fission must normalize to 0x100000 while preserving Thumb context. Ghidra oracle uses the imported aligned .text address.

rows.name: arm8m-be-low-bit-addw
rows.notes: BE Thumb row guards byte alignment and context propagation for odd code pointers.
